input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 43 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "respiratory", "count": 7, "message": "7 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 12, "message": "12 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}, {"category": "general", "count": 7, "message": "7 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 3, "message": "3 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "cardiac", "count": 5, "message": "5 cardiac patients incoming", "protocol": "Pre-alert cath lab \u2014 multiple cardiac presentations"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 5, "message": "5 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 47, "current_utilization": 72, "recommendation": "Projected full in 47 min. Consider: expedite discharges, divert CTAS 4-5."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "St. Michael's Hospital", "facility_id": "st-michaels", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to St. Michael's Hospital (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "SickKids Hospital", "facility_id": "sickkids", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to SickKids Hospital (0% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Toronto General Hospital is at 72% utilization, projected to be full in 47 minutes with 43 incoming patients. Prioritize activating isolation protocols for 7 respiratory patients, infection control for 5 GI patients, and the crisis team for 3 mental health patients. Expedite discharges and divert CTAS 4-5 patients to less-loaded facilities like CAMH or St. Michael's to manage imminent capacity issues.
